title: evaluate suppressed features
manager: Over the years a number of features were switched off — commented out, flagged dark, or left half-wired — and never re-checked. This is the audit pass that walks each one and rules: revive it, delete it, or refile it as real era work. It ships nothing by itself; its product is a decision list, so 6.0 inherits a codebase with no mystery dead switches nobody remembers the state of.
